q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Jinja2.from_string(...).render() on line 14 is the SSTI sink and can lead to Remote Code Execution when processing user-controlled input.

mock_guidance.target: Mock the Jinja2.from_string method or its resulting Template object's render method to intercept the call on line 14.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the template-source string argument passed to Jinja2.from_string (i.e., 'Welcome ' + username + '!') to verify that user-controlled data reaches the sink unsanitized.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Return a benign placeholder string (e.g., 'mocked_render_output') so that the function can continue to return an HTMLResponse without evaluating the potentially malicious template.
notes: Ensure the mock does not evaluate the concatenated string as a Jinja2 template.
Verify that the captured argument contains the injected payload to confirm the vulnerability.
